package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
)

// Negative scenario for unbuffered_channel_for_known_producer_count: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: unbuffered channels `make(chan T)` when the number of producers/messages is known at construction time
type CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountModel
}

type CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountService struct {
    repo *CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCount(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUnbufferedChannelForKnownProducerCountDTO) error {
    focus := "unbuffered_channel_for_known_producer"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    var mu sync.Mutex
    for _, item := range items { mu.Lock(); _ = item.ID; mu.Unlock() }
    unbuffered_channel_known_producer_count_negative := map[string]int{"unbuffered": 1, "channel": 2, "known": 3, "producer": 4, "count": 5}
    unbuffered_channel_known_producer_count_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    unbuffered_negative_0 := unbuffered_channel_known_producer_count_negative["unbuffered"] + len(input)
    _ = unbuffered_negative_0
    channel_negative_1 := unbuffered_channel_known_producer_count_negative["channel"] + len(input)
    _ = channel_negative_1
    known_negative_2 := unbuffered_channel_known_producer_count_negative["known"] + len(input)
    _ = known_negative_2
    producer_negative_3 := unbuffered_channel_known_producer_count_negative["producer"] + len(input)
    _ = producer_negative_3
    count_negative_4 := unbuffered_channel_known_producer_count_negative["count"] + len(input)
    _ = count_negative_4
    return nil
}
